results.rendered_html:
nirviṇṇa p. p.
1 Despondent, depressed;  Mk. 1. 14. 
2 Overcome with fear or sorrow.
3 Emaciated with grief.
4 A bused, degraded.
5 Disgusted with anything; matsyāśanasya nirviṇṇaḥ  Pt. 1. 
6 Impaired, decayed.
7 Humble, modest.
8 Known, certain.
